description: Page Four TOILING FARMERS AND IMPERIALIST WAR By HENRY PURO AS the economic crisis is deepening in all cap italist countries the ruling capitalist class looks more and more towards new wars as the most effective way out of the crisis Even the other measures that the capitalist governments have resorted to like inflation setting up high tariff walls etc are sharpening the contradic tions between different capitalist countries and therefore are leading towards war But first of all the mutual hatred of all capitalist gov ernments and capitalists of all countries against the Soviet Union and the gigantic growth of socialism there increases enormously the dan ger of war in the form of a common attack of all capitalist powers against this workers and farmers republic The question of the war danger Is twofold 1 the question of the fight between two sys tems 2 the question of the redistribution of the world between leading imperialist powers We do not need to speak any more about the war danger only in abstract terms for we have seen it already in concrete form The war 3s already here We have seen It In the attack of Japanese Imperialists supported by
